nodes.context: Camorra clan operating in the northeastern suburbs of Naples, specifically San Pietro a Patierno and Secondigliano.
Camorra alliance founded by Gaetano Bocchetti, operating in Secondigliano.
Camorra clan whose accountant Gaetano Manzo worked for the Sacco-Bocchetti clan.

edges.context: Gaetano Bocchetti, co-founder of the Sacco-Bocchetti clan, was the founder of the Alleanza di Secondigliano.
Gaetano Manzo, accountant of the Manzo clan, managed finances and drug supply for the Sacco-Bocchetti clan.
